notes: Captured Admin GraphQL 2026-04 delivery-profile variant association evidence covers a valid staged ProductVariant, nonexistent ProductVariant create/update association targets, and wrong-GID-type create/update targets. The proxy replay creates the product through public GraphQL, associates only verified variants, replays Shopify-backed nodes(ids:) cassettes for missing ProductVariant hydration, and preserves the existing valid association after invalid update attempts.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy creates a synthetic local product ID while Shopify returns the live dev-store product ID.
The proxy creates a synthetic local ProductVariant ID while Shopify returns the live dev-store variant ID.
The proxy creates a synthetic local delivery profile ID while Shopify returns the live dev-store profile ID.
The associated product comes from the proxy-created product, not Shopify's live product ID.
The associated variant comes from the proxy-created ProductVariant, not Shopify's live variant ID.

Shopify returns opaque cursors for one-item delivery-profile item connections while the local connection helper reports null cursors; the association branch is covered by the surrounding id, title, and count assertions.

The retained association points at the proxy-created product ID.
